clonePrefix.description: Prefix prepended to the local clone folder name, e.g. "@ssv" or "sketch7"

shell.description: Shell to use for executing commands, e.g. "powershell", "bash", "sh"

org.description: Config-level org — used as {{org}} fallback when repo.org is not set

repoUrlTemplate.description: Default URL template for cloning repos when repo.url is not set. Supports interpolation: {{repo.name}}, {{org}}, {{projectName}}, and any vars. e.g. "https://github.com/{{org}}/{{repo.name}}.git"

vars.description: Generic string variables available for interpolation in URLs and commands. Also used as fallback for {{org}} via vars.org.

wsRoot.description: Per-config workspace root. Supports {{wsRoot}} token resolved from the global ws-root setting, e.g. "{{wsRoot}}/bssn"

url.description: Git clone URL. Supports interpolation: {{repo.name}}, {{org}}, {{projectName}}, and any vars. Overrides config-level repoUrlTemplate.

org.description: Per-repo org override — used for {{org}} interpolation

clonePrefix.description: Per-repo clone prefix override (overrides config-level clonePrefix)

items.description: A single-key record mapping a command name to a shell expression, e.g. { "git-pull": "git pull" }

commands.description: Commands specific to this repo, run after global commands

skipGlobalCommands.description: Keys of globalCommands entries to skip for this repo

items.description: A single-key record mapping a command name to a shell expression, e.g. { "git-pull": "git pull" }

globalCommands.description: Commands run for every repo (filtered by skipGlobalCommands per repo)
